message:
perf(storage): incremental index updates and optimized ID lookups

Major performance and consistency improvements to all storage modules:

## Incremental Index Updates

Added `updateIndexForSessionUnlocked()` to all session-based storage classes:
- anomaly-storage.ts
- assumption-storage.ts
- critique-storage.ts
- hypothesis-storage.ts
- intervention-storage.ts
- test-storage.ts

Instead of rebuilding the entire index on every save, these methods now:
1. Read the existing index
2. Filter out entries for the current session
3. Add new entries from the saved data
4. Write the updated index

Falls back to full rebuild if index is missing or corrupt.

## Enhanced ID Parsing

Updated `getXById()` methods to support both ID formats:
- Complex: `X-{sessionId}-{seq}` (e.g., `H-brenner_bot-5so.10-001`)
- Simple: `X{n}` (e.g., `H1`, `T2`)

Changed ID regex from `/^X-(.+)-\d{3}$/` to `/^X-(.+)-\d+$/`:
- Allows any number of sequence digits (not just 3)
- Aligns with schema pattern updates

## Optimized Delete Operations

Enhanced `deleteX()` methods with fast-path optimization:
- First attempts to extract session ID from compound ID format
- Only falls back to full scan when session cannot be determined
- Reduces I/O for common delete patterns

## Unified File Locking

program-storage.ts: Replaced custom in-process lock implementation with
shared `withFileLock()` from file-lock.ts for consistency across all
storage modules.
